name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What concrete problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or safer alternatives you considered.

## Verification

How should we verify the change once implemented?

## Boundary Notes

- Does this affect architecture, support claims, or web-panel module boundaries?
- Does this require live Windows-MCP validation, or is fast local verification enough?
